__comment: Progressive strictness target. Not adopted by any package yet — this file exists so that follow-up PRs can migrate packages one at a time by changing a single `extends` line (e.g. from `../../tsconfig.service.json` to `../../tsconfig.strict.json`). Each migration should be scoped to one package, track remaining violations via `// @ts-expect-error TODO(strict-migration): ...` comments, and aim to drive that grep count to zero. Do NOT flip a shared library (`therr-public-library/therr-js-utilities`, `therr-public-library/therr-react`) first — stricter types there cascade as `.d.ts` breakage to every consumer.
